title: Document block
description: A typed prose block attachable to tokens, components, or anatomy parts. See spec/document-blocks.md.

type.description: Block type. One of: purpose, guideline, accessibility, do-dont, examples.

agents.description: Optional LLM-tuned rephrasing of content for agent consumption. Should differ from content.

do.description: Recommended practice. Meaningful only on do-dont blocks.

dont.description: Anti-pattern to avoid. Meaningful only on do-dont blocks.
